framework.name: Macaroons/Biscuits/Wafers for Offline Scope Attenuation
framework.description: Token formats where holders can only ADD restrictions (append-only caveats), never expand permissions. Each sub-agent adds a signed caveat narrowing scope, creating verifiable delegation chains without recontacting the auth server. No major IdP supports these natively yet.
framework.raw_quote: Each token is 'baked' with core attributes: identity, expiry, and a cryptographic root. Holders can add layers that only reduce permissions. Tokens remain verifiable offline.

source.title: Control the Chain, Secure the System: Fixing AI Agent Delegation
